name: Zhejiang Huamei Holding CO., LTD.
summary: Zhejiang Huamei Holding CO., LTD. primarily engages in the outdoor advertising activity. The company is also involved in the newspaper, magazine, and business printing businesses; and operation community site, news portal, vertical real estate portal, regional portal, etc. In addition, it engages in the city distribution business. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
